info.title: AFAL Phase 1 HTTP Capability Contract
info.summary: OpenAPI-style draft for the framework-free AFAL capability transport layer
info.description:
This draft describes the Phase 1 HTTP surface above the AFAL API adapter.

It is intentionally narrow and tracks the current implementation under `backend/afal/http/`.
The goal is to freeze route names, request envelopes, status-code behavior, and top-level
response semantics before choosing an HTTP server framework.

Phase 1 scope in this draft:
- request payment approval capability
- execute payment capability
- request resource approval capability
- settle resource usage capability
- approval session lookup, callback result application, authorization resume, and AFAL action resume
- stable requestRef handling
- structured success/error envelopes

Current behavior note:
- `request-payment-approval` and `request-resource-approval` expose top-level `pending-approval` AFAL responses
- `resume-approved-action` resumes a persisted approved action into settlement and receipt creation
- `execute-payment` and `settle-resource-usage` still represent the synchronous seeded flow path

servers.description: Placeholder server for contract drafting only

post.summary: Create a top-level pending payment approval request

200.description: Payment request entered pending approval state

post.description:
Accepts a structured payment capability request and returns either a fully structured
payment flow result or a structured AFAL error envelope.

post.summary: Create a top-level pending resource approval request

200.description: Resource request entered pending approval state

post.summary: Execute a resource settlement capability request
post.description:
Accepts a structured resource capability request and returns either a fully structured
resource flow result or a structured AFAL error envelope.

post.summary: Apply a trusted-surface approval callback result

200.description: Approval result was persisted against the approval session

post.summary: Resume authorization after an approval result is present

200.description: Approval session resumed and final authorization was produced

post.summary: Resume an approved AFAL action into settlement, receipt, and final response creation

200.description: Approved action resumed to final AFAL settlement output

BadRequestResponse.description: Request envelope or transport shape is invalid

request-ref-mismatch.summary: requestRef mismatch between HTTP envelope and capability input

error.message: requestRef must match between the HTTP envelope and capability input

unsupported-method.summary: unsupported method for a capability route

ForbiddenResponse.description: Capability cannot proceed because authorization or credential checks failed

credential-verification-failed.summary: policy credential could not be verified

error.message: Mock AFAL flow requires a verified policy credential: "cred-policy-0001"
Mock payment flow stopped before settlement because authorization result was "rejected"

NotFoundResponse.description: Referenced route, DID, account, budget, quota, or action is unknown

unknown-account.summary: payer account reference is not known

error.message: Unknown accountRef "acct-missing" for mock ATS state

unknown-resource-budget.summary: resource budget reference is not known

error.message: Unknown resource budget "budg-res-missing" for mock ATS state

unknown-approval-session.summary: approval session reference is not known

ConflictResponse.description: Capability request reached a non-terminal conflict such as expired or cancelled approval

authorization-expired.summary: approval expired before settlement could proceed

error.message: Mock payment flow stopped before settlement because authorization result was "expired"

authorization-cancelled.summary: approval was cancelled before resource settlement

error.message: Mock resource flow stopped before settlement because authorization result was "cancelled"

ProviderFailureResponse.description: Downstream provider usage confirmation or settlement dependency failed
